label: City Population (Proper)
deltaNote: City proper within 16 alcaldías; metro area ~22.5M

label: Metro Area Population
deltaNote: World's 6th-largest metro area; 2nd-largest in Western Hemisphere

label: Homicide Rate (per 100k, 2024)
contestNote: CDMX rate is among Mexico's lowest — well below national average of ~22/100k. Critics argue femicides are systematically undercounted as homicides.

label: Metro Daily Ridership (STC)
deltaNote: 2nd-largest metro in North America; 12 lines, 195 stations, 226 km

label: Share of National GDP
deltaNote: Metro area produces ~22% of Mexico's GDP; city proper ~15.8%. Largest economic zone in Latin America after São Paulo.

label: Cutzamala Reservoir Level
contestNote: Dropped to historic low of 30% in May 2024 drought. Partially recovered by 2025 rainy season. 40% of city water lost to leaks.

label: CDMX Annual Budget 2025
source: Congreso CDMX / Secretaría de Finanzas CDMX Dec 2024
deltaNote: Includes MXN 23B for Metro modernization — largest Metro investment in history

label: Max Land Subsidence Rate
contestNote: Historic center sinking ~50cm/yr in worst zones; Palacio de Bellas Artes and Cathedral visibly tilting. Caused by groundwater over-extraction from ancient lake bed.
